‚ÄčD] GRAMMAR‚Äč
‚ÄčQ1. Identify and correct the error‚Äč
‚Äč‚ÄúShe don‚Äôt like playing football.‚ÄĚ‚Äč
‚ÄčRubric (5 marks):‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčError identified (‚Äúdon‚Äôt‚ÄĚ incorrect) (2)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCorrect verb form ‚Äúdoesn‚Äôt‚ÄĚ (2)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčFull corrected sentence:‚Äč
‚Äč‚ÄúShe doesn‚Äôt like playing football.‚ÄĚ (1)‚Äč
‚ÄčQ2. Fill in the blank (Tense)‚Äč
‚ÄčBy next year, I ______ (complete) my degree.‚Äč
‚ÄčRubric (5 marks):‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCorrect tense identified (future perfect) (2)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCorrect form: ‚Äúwill have completed‚ÄĚ (3)‚Äč
‚ÄčQ3. Change to passive voice‚Äč
‚Äč‚ÄúThe teacher explained the concept clearly.‚ÄĚ‚Äč
‚ÄčRubric (5 marks):‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčObject correctly identified (concept) (1)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCorrect passive structure used (2)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCorrect answer:‚Äč
‚Äč‚ÄúThe concept was explained clearly by the teacher.‚ÄĚ (2)‚Äč
‚ÄčQ4. Choose the correct word‚Äč
‚ÄčHe is ______ (strong/stronger/strongest) than his brother.‚Äč
‚ÄčRubric (3 marks):‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCorrect answer: ‚Äústronger‚ÄĚ (3)‚Äč
‚ÄčQ5. Rewrite with proper punctuation‚Äč
‚Äč‚Äúwhat are you doing now‚ÄĚ‚Äč
‚ÄčRubric (5 marks):‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčCapitalization (‚ÄúWhat‚ÄĚ) (2)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčQuestion mark (2)‚Äč
‚Äč‚óŹ‚Äč
‚ÄčFull correct sentence (1)‚Äč
